findings.design_reference: FR-033 / SC-011; devops-operations and verification-confidence lenses
findings.comment: The newly added blocking self-leak CI lane is red on the reviewed tree. Running tests/unit/self-leak-lint.tests.ps1 reaches its real-repo born-clean guard and reports five unannotated DEC-198-* hits (shared-governance.ps1 lines 1791, 1836, 1925, 1962 and validate-governance.ps1 line 1567), so scripts/internal/lint-self-leak.ps1 exits 1. Because .github/workflows/specrew-ci.yml now invokes that command as a blocking job, this increment cannot pass its claimed CI enforcement. Remove/parameterize the self identifiers or add valid reason-bearing annotations where they are intentionally shipped, then rerun the paired test and real lint.
